sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ المُعَلِّمُ مِنَ الطُّلَّابِ لَعِبَةَ بَيْعٍ وَشِرَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnik je zamolio učenike da igraju igru prodaje i kupovine.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher asked the students to play a buying and selling game.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَى كُلَّ طَالِبٍ نُقُودًا وَرَقِيَّةً مَصْنُوعَةً مِنَ الكَرْتُونِ.
sentences.translation: Dao je svakom učeniku papirnati novac napravljen od kartona.
sentences.translationEn: He gave each student paper money made from cardboard.

sentences.translation: Neki su prodavali a drugi kupovali.
sentences.translationEn: Some of them sold and others bought.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمُوا كَيْفَ يَسْأَلُونَ عَنِ السِّعْرِ وَيَدْفَعُونَ.
sentences.translation: Naučili su kako pitati za cijenu i platiti.
sentences.translationEn: They learned how to ask about the price and pay.
